response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced software engineer with a strong background in full-stack development, high-scale microservices, and testing frameworks. However, the resume lacks any demonstrated experience in the core focus areas of this Principal role: growth strategy, enterprise experimentation platforms, A/B testing, feature flagging, and telemetry infrastructure. Without this specialized domain knowledge, he is unlikely to succeed in architecting the foundational experimentation systems required for this position.
strengths: Extensive software engineering experience (15+ years) across multiple languages including TypeScript, C++, Java, and DLang.
Proven ability to design high-scale, low-latency microservices, handling millions of requests per second at Dunnhumby.
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling, aligning with the AI-first focus of the role.
concerns: No visible experience building or managing enterprise-scale experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, or feature-flagging systems.
Lacks demonstrated background in growth engineering, product telemetry, or working closely with Data Science on metrics.
Most recent roles are in generalist full-stack capacities rather than Principal-level platform architecture in the required domain.
